result.markdown:
---
title: "Cheatsheet"
sidebar: tips-sidebar
---

A quick reference for everything covered in this section.

---

## YAML ŌĆö `_quarto.yml` options

### Project

```{.yaml}
project:
  type: website       # website | book | manuscript | default
  output-dir: docs    # where rendered files go
```

### Execute (global code defaults)

```{.yaml}
execute:
  echo: true          # show source code
  eval: true          # run the code
  warning: false      # hide warnings
  error: false        # hide errors
  freeze: auto        # auto | true | false
```

### Format

```{.yaml}
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - custom.scss
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: false
  pdf:
    toc: true
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=2.5cm
  docx:
    toc: true
```

### Website

```{.yaml}
website:
  title: "My Site"
  navbar:
    left:
      - text: "Home"
        href: index.qmd
      - text: "External"
        href: https://example.com
    right:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/your/repo
  sidebar:
    - id: my-sidebar
      style: docked        # docked | floating
      contents:
        - href: page.qmd
          text: Page Title
        - section: "Group"
          contents:
            - href: sub.qmd
              text: Sub-page
```

### Profiles

```{.yaml}
profile:
  default: web
  group: [web, print, de, en]
```

---

## QMD ŌĆö code chunk options

```{.yaml}
#| echo: false          # hide source code
#| eval: false          # don't run (show code only)
#| output: false        # hide output
#| warning: false       # hide warnings
#| include: false       # hide everything (no trace in output)
#| code-fold: true      # true | false ŌĆö collapsible code block
#| code-summary: "Show the code"
#| fig-cap: "My figure"
#| fig-align: center    # left | center | right
#| label: fig-myplot    # for cross-referencing
```

### Cross-reference labels

| Type | Label prefix | Reference |
|---|---|---|
| Figure | `fig-` | `@fig-myplot` |
| Table | `tbl-` | `@tbl-mydata` |
| Section | `sec-` (on heading) | `@sec-intro` |

---

## QMD ŌĆö conditional content

```{.markdown}
::: {.content-visible when-profile="de"}
Nur auf Deutsch sichtbar.
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
Not in PDF.
:::
```

---

## QMD ŌĆö Markdown elements

### Callouts

```{.markdown}
::: {.callout-note}
::: {.callout-tip}
::: {.callout-warning}
::: {.callout-important}
::: {.callout-caution}

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Title
Hidden by default.
:::
```

### Shortcodes

```{.markdown}
{{</* include other-file.qmd */>}}   ŌåÉ embed another file
{{</* pagebreak */>}}                ŌåÉ force page break (PDF)
{{</* kbd Ctrl+C */>}}               ŌåÉ keyboard shortcut styling
```

### Grid layout

```{.markdown}
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-6}
Left column (half width)
:::
::: {.g-col-6}
Right column (half width)
:::
:::
```

Column widths are in 12ths: `g-col-4` = one third, `g-col-6` = half, `g-col-12` = full.

---

## Extensions ŌĆö syntax summary

### quizdown

````{.markdown}
```{quizdown}
# Question text?
1. [x] Correct answer
1. [ ] Wrong answer
```
````

### Pyodide

````{.markdown}
```{pyodide-python}
#| autorun: false
#| readonly: false
print("runs in browser")
```
````

### py-exercise

````{.markdown}
```{py-exercise}
def my_func(x):
    pass        # student fills this in

## TESTS ##
assert my_func(2) == 4
```
````

### JSXGraph

````{.markdown}
```jsxgraph
var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(BOARDID, {
    boundingbox: [-5, 5, 5, -5], axis: true
});
board.create('functiongraph', [Math.sin]);
```
````

---

## CSS ŌĆö Bootstrap utility classes

| Class | Effect |
|---|---|
| `.text-center` | Centre text |
| `.text-muted` | Grey text |
| `.text-white` | White text |
| `.fw-bold` | Bold |
| `.border` | Border |
| `.rounded` | Rounded corners |
| `.shadow` | Drop shadow |
| `.bg-light` | Light background |
| `.bg-primary` | Primary colour background |
| `.p-{0-5}` | Padding all sides |
| `.m-{0-5}` | Margin all sides |
| `.mt-{0-5}` / `.mb-{0-5}` | Margin top / bottom |
| `.d-flex` | Flexbox container |
| `.gap-{0-5}` | Gap between flex items |
| `.justify-content-center` | Centre flex items |

## CSS ŌĆö SCSS variable reference

```{.scss}
/*-- scss:defaults --*/
$primary:            #0d6efd;
$body-bg:            #ffffff;
$body-color:         #212529;
$font-family-base:   "Inter", sans-serif;
$font-size-base:     1rem;
$headings-font-weight: 600;
$border-radius:      0.375rem;
$border-color:       #dee2e6;

/*-- scss:rules --*/
/* your custom CSS here */
```
